summary: Iteration 7 — frontend-only regression sweep at https://startup-fixer.preview.emergentagent.com (mobile viewport 390x844). ALL acceptance criteria PASS. (1) App loads without crash, ZERO pageerrors, no red-screen on any of the 8 tabs. The dependency cleanup (removed expo-video + @react-navigation/{core,elements,routers,stack,drawer}) and the metro.config.js sourceExts change did NOT cause any module-resolution errors — bundle compiles and the 8 tabs all navigate cleanly: /nexushome, /scripts, /butler, /knowledge, /logs, /builder, /skins, /settings. All testIDs tab-nexushome, tab-scripts, tab-butler, tab-knowledge, tab-logs, tab-builder, tab-skins, tab-settings present and tappable. (2) Home section titles (SectionTitle3D) render centered with the 3D extrusion duplicate confirmed empirically — each title text appears TWICE in the DOM (face layer + black offset extrusion layer): 'PC SERVER · DOWNLOAD' x3 (incl. accent ref), 'INFO · HOW IT WORKS' x2, 'COMMAND MODULES' x2, 'GET STARTED' x2. Home screenshot shows the centered white extruded text with red underline + diamond caps + steel side-rails framing each header — matches the spec. COMMAND MODULES 2x2 tile grid renders below the title (visible in /home_full.png). (3) QuickButlerBar: visible on every tab with the red robot-angry-outline badge, '>' prompt chevron + blinking cursor, taller 52px slab and bigger 14px input — confirmed in screenshots of scripts/skins/config/build/home/kb/logs/butler. Typed 'check prefill iter7' on Home, pressed quickbar-send → router pushed to /butler AND the input value 'check prefill iter7' is present in the butler composer (verified by reading TextInput .value via Playwright). The @butler_prefill_prompt key is cleared after consumption. (4) Settings (CONFIG): ZERO forbidden IMPORT strings ('IMPORT JSON', 'IMPORT UI CONFIG', 'ONE JSON POWERHOUSE', '⚡ IMPORT JSON' all absent). All 4 required EXPORT cards present: EXPORT ALL FILES ✓, UI VISUAL CONFIG ✓, DOWNLOAD UI CONFIG ✓, RESET TO DEFAULTS ✓. Section headers render in centered 3D style. (5) PC tab (/logs): page renders without crash; 'NEXUS INTELLIGENCE' and 'PERFORMANCE MONITOR' centered 3D headers BOTH present in DOM. (6) Knowledge, Builder, Skins, Scripts, Butler tabs all render with no crash, no red-screen, centered 3D titles where defined. Page errors: 0. Deprecated packages detected: NONE. SafeAreaView issues detected: NONE. Carry-over LOW from iter 5/6: the LOCAL AI BEHAVIORAL NOTICE modal on /butler still mounts on first visit and visually overlays the FuturisticTabBar (z-index issue). Now that the QuickBar handoff sends EVERY composer-using session straight to /butler, this carry-over is more user-visible — recommend bumping priority. The actual storage key for the modal is '@butler_ai_disclosure_v1' (butler.tsx:114), not any of the @butler_ai_notice_* keys previous testers tried — pre-seeding that exact key will suppress the modal in tests.

ui_bugs.component: Butler LOCAL AI BEHAVIORAL NOTICE modal vs FuturisticTabBar
ui_bugs.issue: (carry-over from iter 5/6, now more impactful) The first-visit LOCAL AI BEHAVIORAL NOTICE modal at /butler renders ABOVE the FuturisticTabBar and absorbs taps on every other tab pill until 'ENTER BUTLER AI' is pressed. Because the new QuickButlerBar handoff (quickbar-send) ALWAYS routes the user to /butler, every fresh session now hits this trap on first send. The modal's storage gate uses AI_DISCLOSURE_KEY='@butler_ai_disclosure_v1' (butler.tsx:114) and is only marked seen on press at butler.tsx:1181 — so it always shows on a clean install. Reference: /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/butler.tsx:435 (modal markup), butler.tsx:114 (key), butler.tsx:984/1181 (gate + dismiss).
ui_bugs.testID: tab-* (any non-butler pill while notice open)

issues: RN 0.81+ style-deprecation warnings still flood console: 'shadow*' → use boxShadow, 'textShadow*' → use textShadow, props.pointerEvents → style.pointerEvents, Image style.resizeMode → props.resizeMode. SectionTitle3D itself uses textShadow* (line 46-48) and QuickButlerBar uses shadow* (lines 179, 189, 265). Worth sweeping before the next RN bump — non-blocking.
kbGrowthTracker still emits '[kbGrowthTracker] documentDirectory unavailable' on every poll on web — should be gated once per session.

action_items: (MEDIUM, was LOW) Fix LOCAL AI BEHAVIORAL NOTICE modal blocking tab bar on /butler — now hit by every QuickBar handoff. Options: (a) lower the modal container zIndex below the tab bar's outerWrap; (b) wrap modal in pointerEvents='box-none' so only the card absorbs touch; (c) auto-dismiss on navigation-state change. File: /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/butler.tsx:435; key constant at butler.tsx:114 ('@butler_ai_disclosure_v1').

(LOW) Sweep deprecated style props once: shadow* → boxShadow (QuickButlerBar.tsx:179,189,265), textShadow* → textShadow (SectionTitle3D.tsx:46-48), style.resizeMode → props.resizeMode, props.pointerEvents → style.pointerEvents.
(LOW) Gate '[kbGrowthTracker] documentDirectory unavailable' warning once-per-session on web.
critical_code_review_comments: SectionTitle3D.tsx (/app/frontend/components/ui/SectionTitle3D.tsx) is a clean, focused 95-line component. Centered layout with steel rails + diamond caps + extrusion layer + face layer with accent glow + underline matches the visual spec. fontSize default 15 is honored across all callsites. One nit: uses deprecated textShadow* props (lines 46-48) — replace with textShadow shorthand for RN 0.81+.

QuickButlerBar.tsx (/app/frontend/components/ui/QuickButlerBar.tsx) — 52px taller slab, red robot-angry-outline badge, blinking cursor, idle→armed send button animation, and AsyncStorage prefill handoff all work end-to-end. testIDs quickbar-input and quickbar-send are present. Deprecated shadow* props at lines 179, 189, 265 — replace with boxShadow shorthand.

metro.config.js — sourceExts merge via Array.from(new Set(['mjs', ...defaults])) correctly preserves Expo defaults (cjs + platform variants). expo-video stub aliases at lines 38-40 are appropriate since expo-video was removed from the dep tree but may still be transitively referenced. No regressions observed.

app.json — slug 'butler-ai-pc-automation' valid, newArchEnabled moved to top-level (line 144), no invalid props detected. iOS infoPlist + Android permissions intact. Plugins array clean (no expo-video).

All 8 tab files (nexushome, scripts, butler, knowledge, logs, builder, skins, settings) load cleanly via Expo Router file-based routing. Hidden tabs (terminal, fileshare, support) remain accessible only via in-app actions.
8 of 11 tab files still exceed the 700-line guideline (settings ~2761, butler ~1279, scripts ~3645, knowledge ~3403). Carry-over from iter 6 — keep splitting in future passes.

success_rate.frontend: 8/8 tabs load without crash · 8/8 tabs navigate cleanly via tab-* testIDs · 8/8 tabs render QuickButlerBar (quickbar-input + quickbar-send) · 4/4 home SectionTitle3D headers render centered with 3D extrusion (2× DOM occurrences each) · 2/2 logs headers (NEXUS INTELLIGENCE + PERFORMANCE MONITOR) present · 0/4 forbidden IMPORT strings in Settings · 4/4 required EXPORT strings in Settings · QuickBar→AI handoff: PASS (prefill text confirmed in butler TextInput.value) · Page errors: 0

seed_data_creation: page.add_init_script seeded the 7 onboarding/consent localStorage keys (@butler_onboarding_done_v2, @butler_consent_v2, @butler_terms_accepted_v1, @butler_privacy_accepted_v1, @butler_age_confirmed_v1, @butler_lan_consent_v1, @butler_server_privacy_accepted_v1) — those work and skip onboarding to land directly on /home. The LOCAL AI BEHAVIORAL NOTICE modal on /butler is gated by '@butler_ai_disclosure_v1' (butler.tsx:114) — seeding that key suppresses the modal. Previous testers were trying @butler_ai_notice_* / @butler_local_ai_notice_seen_v1 which do NOT match the actual key.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bundle at https://startup-fixer.preview.emergentagent.com serves HTTP 200, hydrates within ~12 s at mobile viewport 390x844 (first cold load). Pre-seed the 7 onboarding/consent keys to skip onboarding AND seed '@butler_ai_disclosure_v1'='1' to suppress the LOCAL AI BEHAVIORAL NOTICE modal on /butler. Visible tab testIDs: tab-{nexushome,scripts,butler,knowledge,logs,builder,skins,settings}. Persistent floating composer mounted in (tabs)/_layout.tsx: quickbar-input + quickbar-send. QuickBar handoff key: @butler_prefill_prompt (consumed by butler.tsx:874). To verify the 3D centered title visuals, count the title string occurrences in body.innerText — they should appear ≥2× per title due to the extrusion + face layer in SectionTitle3D.
rca_of_issue: Carry-over MEDIUM bug — LOCAL AI BEHAVIORAL NOTICE modal absorbs FuturisticTabBar pill taps. Root cause: the modal at butler.tsx:435 renders inside the screen's normal stacking context with a high effective z-index (full-screen overlay backdrop covers the viewport including the bottom 96px reserved for FuturisticTabBar + QuickButlerBar). Fix: either (a) `pointerEvents='box-none'` on the backdrop container and `pointerEvents='auto'` on the card so taps outside the card pass through, OR (b) lower the modal's outermost View zIndex to a value below the tab-bar (FuturisticTabBar wraps at zIndex high — check (tabs)/_layout.tsx for exact value), OR (c) subscribe to navigation state changes and auto-dismiss the notice when the user navigates off /butler. The QuickBar handoff change in this iteration increases user impact because every send routes to /butler.
